executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned checks are green, but the live system remains externally blocked by the marketing owner loop failing independent verification on unhealthy runner and flat-adoption evidence.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Repair the marketing owner bundle until it earns a fresh independent pass; keep architecture fail-closed and do not recategorize the marketing red as architecture green.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus jobs.json comparison with explicit live-vs-persisted separation

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Marketing owner loop is still the only live blocker domain
findings.mechanism: marketing_loop_independent_verification.json is fail; the runner bundle is not healthy, momentum is needs_attention, and the workflow audit still shows a needs_repair conversion bottleneck with flat primary-repo adoption.
findings.root_cause: Fresh marketing evidence still says current tactics are not healthy enough to certify.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep the blocker localized to marketing, execute the pending repair window, and require a fresh marketing independent pass before any broader healthy claim.

findings.title: Architecture-owned verification is live-green again after refresh
findings.mechanism: loop_integrity_latest.json keeps agent-architecture-watchdog status=ok, health_monitor_latest.json no longer reports architecture-owned blockers, and agent_architecture_verifier_latest.md is independently verified pass.
findings.root_cause: The verifier chain is now aligned with current runtime state and isolates external blockers cleanly.
findings.recommended_fix: Preserve the fail-closed freshness checks and ownership isolation.

findings.title: Docs verifier is green and stable on the current pass window
findings.mechanism: ralph_verifier_latest.md is independently verified pass and the latest agentic artifact is pass with no must-fix items.
findings.root_cause: Docs-owned issues are not part of the current blocker set after refresh.
findings.recommended_fix: No repair needed here beyond preserving the current verifier contract.

findings.title: Persisted disabled cron history remains separate from live topology
findings.mechanism: The live scheduler has zero disabled jobs while jobs.json still retains disabled historical entries.
findings.root_cause: Persisted history and live scheduler state are distinct surfaces.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue reporting persisted disabled history separately from live runtime state.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Repair the unhealthy marketing runner/outcome path and get a fresh marketing independent pass artifact
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: That remains the only live blocker domain.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Overall system risk can drop once the owner loop clears on fresh evidence.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun architecture independent verification after the next material marketing evidence change
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Architecture is locally sound; the next verdict shift depends on marketing state.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Architecture signoff stays aligned with live owner-loop reality.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Reran loop_integrity_audit.py and confirmed agent-architecture-watchdog remains status=ok while autonomous-marketing-stack remains the only full-contract error.
Reran health_monitor.py; it still localizes all live issues to the marketing owner domain and records no architecture-owned blockers.
Reran agent_architecture_independent_verify.py and got a fresh qualified_pass artifact with marketing isolated as the only external blocker.
Reran agent_architecture_verifier.py and agent_architecture_checker.py; both passed against the refreshed artifacts.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh healthy marketing independent signoff after the runner bundle is healthy and the primary-repo adoption blocker clears.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains independently red on fresh evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned checks are green again, but the system still cannot claim healthy overall behavior while the marketing owner loop fails on runner health and flat adoption evidence.

notes: Loop integrity still reports autonomous-marketing-stack status=error because the marketing loop remains independently red; that is the intended localization.
Verifier green here means the architecture verification chain passed with external blockers isolated, not that the whole product stack is globally healthy.
Live cron inspection saw 20 enabled jobs, 0 disabled jobs, and no live running/error jobs at check time.
